# Account Opening Checklist

## Core accounts
- [ ] GitHub created
- [ ] Vercel created
- [ ] Supabase created
- [ ] Redis created
- [ ] Google Workspace available
- [ ] HubSpot available
- [ ] Airtable available

## Project setup
- [ ] repo created
- [ ] Vercel project linked to repo
- [ ] Supabase project named and region chosen
- [ ] Redis instance named
- [ ] Google Drive folder structure created
- [ ] admin control plane folder created
- [ ] sandbox folder created
- [ ] quarantine folder created

## Access setup
- [ ] operator emails assigned
- [ ] admin owners assigned
- [ ] environment ownership assigned
- [ ] secret rotation owner assigned
- [ ] summary recipient assigned

## Go-live prerequisites
- [ ] preview environment works
- [ ] production env vars loaded
- [ ] backup export path exists
- [ ] recovery runbook reviewed
- [ ] acceptance test completed
